title: cucurbita pepo var. subverrucosa
intro: Cucurbita pepo var. subverrucosa, also known as the ornamental gourd, is a variety of the Cucurbita pepo species, characterized by its unique, warty exterior and vibrant colors. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cucurbita pepo var. subverrucosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Cucurbita pepo var. subverrucosa can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the fruit to add to capsule or tincture formulations.
